# Harmony Hope Foundation

> A charitable foundation focused on measurable community impact through transparent giving, volunteer coordination, and dignity-first support programs.

## Key Pages

- / — Homepage with donation and volunteer pathways
- /support-center — Match Desk for people needing help and donors/volunteers offering help
- /testimony — Founding members and trust-building narrative
- /blog — Stories, impact updates, and field learnings
- /privacy-policy — Privacy and data commitments
- /terms-of-service — Terms of service

## Topics

- Nonprofit impact and transparency
- Monthly donor programs
- Volunteer matching and community coordination
- Education support and family essentials
- Community resilience and practical aid delivery
